summary: Digital Signatures feature fully tested and working. The signature pad component allows users to draw signatures using canvas or upload signature images. Stamps are optional. Both signature_image and stamp_image fields are correctly stored in the database. PDF generation includes signatures with robust error handling for corrupted images.

minor.issue: Fixed: PDF generation was failing when signature image data was corrupted
minor.fix_applied: Added PIL-based image validation and graceful fallback in pdf_generator.py _process_image_for_pdf method

critical_code_review_comments: SignaturePad component correctly implements canvas drawing with mouse/touch support
Draw/Upload toggle buttons work correctly (data-testid not used for buttons, use Arabic text 'رسم' and 'رفع')
Clear button clears canvas and resets signature state
CertificationAgreement model includes signature_image and stamp_image fields (both Optional[str])
PDF generator handles image embedding with PIL preprocessing and fallback to text placeholder
Backend validates that signature is required before allowing agreement submission

success_rate.backend: 100% - 7/7 passed (2 skipped due to prior agreement submission)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All signature pad UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Created new proposal with access_token: 2bb1c9bd-6f8b-48f8-b588-f209befa0f12 for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital signature feature is complete. SignaturePad component at /app/frontend/src/components/SignaturePad.js. Agreement page at /agreement/{access_token}. Buttons are in Arabic: Draw='رسم', Upload='رفع', Clear='مسح'. Signature canvas has data-testid='signature-canvas'. Agreement submission requires signature (validated both frontend and backend). PDF generation handles corrupted images gracefully with fallback to text placeholder.

upload_button.behavior: Shows upload area for signature image

fields.signature_image: Optional[str] - Base64 encoded image data URL

backend_storage.validation: signature_image is required, stamp_image is optional

pdf_generation.image_handling: PIL validation with graceful fallback to text placeholder for corrupted images

bug_fixes_applied.issue: PDF generation failing with 'broken data stream when reading image file' error
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added robust image processing with PIL validation, RGB conversion, and graceful fallback to text placeholder when image is corrupted
bug_fixes_applied.root_cause: Test signature data was corrupted PNG, and reportlab Image class throws error at render time

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - Email sending logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)
